title: Gluten-Free Cone Ice Cream - Capital Region
tagline: Verified Capital Region ice cream shops with gluten-free cones and real product photos

intent.statement: Document Capital Region ice cream and gelato shops where gluten-free cones are specifically evidenced, not merely general gluten-free flavors.
intent.scope: Albany, Troy, Clifton Park, Saratoga Springs, Ballston Spa, and nearby Capital Region communities. Include only real, validated places with coordinates tied to the actual shop address.
intent.photoPolicy: Use only source-attributed photos showing real ice cream, gelato, cones, sundaes, or frozen desserts from the named place. Exclude stock photos, generic ice cream imagery, storefront-only photos as primary evidence, and candidates without product-level visual proof.

intentHistory.author: import-enriched-index
intentHistory.summary: Imported 7 enriched records from external niche index.

intentHistory.author: codex
intentHistory.summary: Refined map intent around the user's requirement: Capital Region only, gluten-free cones required, real product photos required, and source-backed place validation.
